name: Ratatater!
description: Ratatater! handles like a pocket SMG: slower firing than most, but it hits harder. Its Vladof barrel raises fire rate and magazine size while reducing recoil, trading away accuracy. That makes it strongest up close to mid-range where sustained fire and wide spread can overwhelm targets. Use longer bursts to get the most out of it; the heavy scatter makes it unreliable at distance, but a good roll can still be extremely effective.
notes:
World drop from any appropriate loot source.
Only appears at green rarity or higher.
